languages.text: {n}Из вокс-транслятора раздается поток шипения. Время от времени через помехи прорывается уставший мужской голос, перечисляющий какие-то коды.{/n}
{n}A stream of hissing crackles out of the vox-caster. From time to time, an exhausted male voice breaks through the interference, reciting a series of codes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Из вокс-транслятора раздается поток шипения. Время от времени через помехи прорывается уставший мужской голос, перечисляющий какие-то коды.{/n}

{n}A stream of hissing crackles out of the vox-caster. From time to time, an exhausted male voice breaks through the interference, reciting a series of codes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ヴォクス・キャスターから、ヒスとノイズが混じった声が流れ出ている。時々、疲れた男の声がノイズを掻き分け、一連の暗号を暗唱している。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A stream of hissing crackles out of the vox-caster. From time to time, an exhausted male voice breaks through the interference, reciting a series of codes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Voksyayardan tıslayan cızırtılar dökülüyor. Zaman zaman bitkin bir erkek sesi, paraziti yarıp bir dizi kod okuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A stream of hissing crackles out of the vox-caster. From time to time, an exhausted male voice breaks through the interference, reciting a series of codes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Voksyayardan tıslayan cızırtılar dökülüyor. Zaman zaman bitkin bir erkek sesi, paraziti yarıp bir dizi kod okuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一阵刺耳的音阵电流杂音涌来，间或有一个疲惫的男声冲破干扰，复诵着一连串代码。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A stream of hissing crackles out of the vox-caster. From time to time, an exhausted male voice breaks through the interference, reciting a series of codes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Aus dem Vox-Transmitter ertönt ein zischendes Knistern. Ab und an übertönt eine erschöpfte Männerstimme die Interferenzen, die eine Reihe von Codes wiederholt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A stream of hissing crackles out of the vox-caster. From time to time, an exhausted male voice breaks through the interference, reciting a series of codes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}De l'émetteur vox vous parvient un flux de grésillements entrecoupé d'une voix masculine épuisée récitant une série de codes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A stream of hissing crackles out of the vox-caster. From time to time, an exhausted male voice breaks through the interference, reciting a series of codes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}De l'émetteur vox vous parvient un flux de grésillements entrecoupé d'une voix masculine épuisée récitant une série de codes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El voco amplificador emite un siseo. Ocasionalmente, una voz agotada de hombre atraviesa las interferencias y recita una serie de códigos.{/n}
